title: Anuradhapura Kingdom
summary: The first established kingdom of ancient Sri Lanka, known for its massive stupas and advanced hydraulic civilization.

title: Polonnaruwa Kingdom
summary: A golden era of agricultural prosperity and reunification under mighty kings.

title: Kandyan Kingdom (Mahanuwara)
summary: The last independent monarchy of Sri Lanka, a mountain fortress that resisted colonial powers for over two centuries.

title: World War I
summary: The war to end all wars, sparked in Sarajevo.

title: Roman Empire
summary: From the assassination of Caesar to the fall of Rome — the empire that shaped the West.
